$comment: WebAssembly v1 (v1) module format. First WASM schema (plan 14 LK8, 2026-05-30). Consumed by `src/link/format/wasm.cpp` via the format-blind linker engine. LK8 ships the linker SKELETON only — the walker emits the 8-byte module preamble (magic 'asm' + version 1) per WebAssembly spec §5.5; plan 18 (MIR→WAT→.wasm) fills the type / import / function / table / memory / global / export / start / element / code / data sections. No `sections[]` declared because the LK8 skeleton emits no section payloads; plan 18 expands this JSON with a WASM-specific section vocabulary when its MIR→WAT walker lands. No `relocations[]` because WASM has no traditional native-style relocations — intra-module references are Function/Table indices resolved by the runtime (per plan 18 §2.1).
